scope.notes: Codex-only durable identity cleanup prep. Local deterministic inspection only; no provider-backed commands or forbidden pipeline commands were run.

proposed_aliases.reason: Same global B6 bus route. Both records have route_id B6 and compatible local-and-limited service type evidence; the alias is a one-source June 2017 CB18 B82/South Brooklyn observation, while the target already aggregates the B6 Local and Limited corridor references.
Same global M15 local route. Both records have route_id M15, service_variant local, and route_type_normalized local; the target is the richer M15 Local record for First/Second Avenue service.
Same global B45 bus route in Flatbush Avenue records. Both records have route_id B45, neither asserts a conflicting service variant/type, and the evidence references identify the same route label.
Same global B69 bus route in Flatbush Avenue records. Both records have route_id B69, neither asserts a conflicting service variant/type, and the evidence references identify the same route label.
Same global Q35 bus route on Flatbush Avenue. Both records have route_id Q35 and Brooklyn/Queens borough evidence; neither asserts a conflicting service variant/type.

Same global Woodhaven/Cross Bay SBS corridor. Both records name the Woodhaven / Cross Bay SBS corridor in Queens and describe the same Woodside-to-Rockaways 14-mile corridor, with no materially different limits.

alias.limits: 14 miles from Woodside to the Rockaways

proposed_aliases.reason: Same global Southern Brooklyn B82 corridor. Both records use the same corridor name and Brooklyn scope; the alias adds explicit Cropsey/Bay 37 to Flatlands/Kings Highway/Rockaway Parkway limits that fit the target's B82 Southern Brooklyn corridor scope.

alias.limits: Cropsey Ave & Bay 37 St to Flatlands Ave / Kings Highway / Rockaway Pkwy

proposed_aliases.reason: Same global Bx6 South Bronx corridor. Both records name the Bx6 South Bronx corridor and give matching Hunts Point/Riverside Drive limits in opposite order, with no materially different scope.

alias.limits: from Riverside Drive West to Hunts Point

candidate_discovery.route_group_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select upper(coalesce(routes.route_id,'')) as route_id, coalesce(json_extract(records.payload,'$.service_variant'),'') as service_variant, coalesce(routes.route_type_normalized,'') as route_type_normalized, count(*) as n, group_concat(records.record_id, ' | ') as ids from records join routes on records.record_id=routes.record_id left join identity_aliases ia on ia.kind='route' and ia.alias=records.record_id where records.record_kind='route' and ia.alias is null and coalesce(routes.route_id,'') != '' group by upper(routes.route_id), coalesce(json_extract(records.payload,'$.service_variant'),''), coalesce(routes.route_type_normalized,'') having n > 1 order by n desc, route_id limit 160;"
candidate_discovery.corridor_group_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select lower(coalesce(corridors.corridor_name, corridors.name, corridors.street, records.display_name,'')) as name_key, coalesce(corridors.borough_normalized,'') as borough, count(*) as n, group_concat(records.record_id, ' | ') as ids from records join corridors on records.record_id=corridors.record_id left join identity_aliases ia on ia.kind='corridor' and ia.alias=records.record_id where records.record_kind='corridor' and ia.alias is null and coalesce(corridors.corridor_name, corridors.name, corridors.street, records.display_name,'') != '' group by lower(coalesce(corridors.corridor_name, corridors.name, corridors.street, records.display_name,'')), coalesce(corridors.borough_normalized,'') having n > 1 order by n desc, name_key limit 160;"
candidate_discovery.result_summary: Selected five route pairs with same route_id and compatible/non-conflicting service variant/type evidence, plus three corridor pairs whose names and limits/scopes match. Skipped same-name corridors with materially different or ambiguous limits, and skipped route groups where evidence or service variant/type was not clean enough.

record_existence_and_kind.count_command: sqlite3 data/canonical.db "select count(*) from records where record_id in ('route_b6-cb18-jun2017','route_b6-2015-sbk-corridor','route_125th-st-m15','route_m15-local-2010-09-14','route_b45-flatbush-ave-cb2','route_b45-flatbush-ave-oct2025','route_b69-flatbush-ave-cb2','route_b69-flatbush-ave-oct2025','route_q35-flatbush-ave-kickoff','route_q35-flatbush-cab1','corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs-corridor','corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs','corridor_brt-b82-mar2018-southern-brooklyn-b82','corridor_b82-southern-brooklyn','corridor_bx6-south-bronx-sept2016','corridor_bx6-south-bronx') and ((record_id like 'route_%' and record_kind='route') or (record_id like 'corridor_%' and record_kind='corridor'));"
record_existence_and_kind.detail_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select r.record_id, r.record_kind, r.display_name, case when r.record_kind='route' then routes.route_id else corridors.corridor_name end as identity_key, case when r.record_kind='route' then coalesce(json_extract(r.payload,'$.service_variant'),'') else coalesce(corridors.limits,'') end as variant_or_limits, case when r.record_kind='route' then coalesce(routes.route_type_normalized,'') else coalesce(corridors.borough_normalized,'') end as type_or_borough, r.primary_source_id from records r left join routes on r.record_id=routes.record_id left join corridors on r.record_id=corridors.record_id where r.record_id in ('route_b6-cb18-jun2017','route_b6-2015-sbk-corridor','route_125th-st-m15','route_m15-local-2010-09-14','route_b45-flatbush-ave-cb2','route_b45-flatbush-ave-oct2025','route_b69-flatbush-ave-cb2','route_b69-flatbush-ave-oct2025','route_q35-flatbush-ave-kickoff','route_q35-flatbush-cab1','corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs-corridor','corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs','corridor_brt-b82-mar2018-southern-brooklyn-b82','corridor_b82-southern-brooklyn','corridor_bx6-south-bronx-sept2016','corridor_bx6-south-bronx') order by r.record_kind, r.record_id;"
record_existence_and_kind.result_summary: 16/16 selected alias and target records exist with the expected record_kind. Route pairs have matching route_id values. Corridor pairs have matching names with compatible limits/scope.

existing_alias_conflicts.alias_merges_json_command: CAND_ALIAS="route_b6-cb18-jun2017 route_125th-st-m15 route_b45-flatbush-ave-cb2 route_b69-flatbush-ave-cb2 route_q35-flatbush-ave-kickoff corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs-corridor corridor_brt-b82-mar2018-southern-brooklyn-b82 corridor_bx6-south-bronx-sept2016"; for id in $CAND_ALIAS; do kind=${id%%_*}; printf '%s ' "$id"; jq -r --arg kind "$kind" --arg id "$id" '(.aliases[$kind][$id] // "NO_MERGE_ALIAS")' data/identity-overrides/merges.json; done
existing_alias_conflicts.alias_merges_json_result: All eight proposed aliases returned NO_MERGE_ALIAS.
existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select kind, alias, target from identity_aliases where (kind='route' and alias in ('route_b6-cb18-jun2017','route_125th-st-m15','route_b45-flatbush-ave-cb2','route_b69-flatbush-ave-cb2','route_q35-flatbush-ave-kickoff')) or (kind='corridor' and alias in ('corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs-corridor','corridor_brt-b82-mar2018-southern-brooklyn-b82','corridor_bx6-south-bronx-sept2016'));"
existing_alias_conflicts.identity_aliases_result: no output; none of the proposed aliases are already present in canonical identity_aliases
existing_alias_conflicts.target_alias_guard_command: CAND_TARGET="route_b6-2015-sbk-corridor route_m15-local-2010-09-14 route_b45-flatbush-ave-oct2025 route_b69-flatbush-ave-oct2025 route_q35-flatbush-cab1 corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs corridor_b82-southern-brooklyn corridor_bx6-south-bronx"; for id in $CAND_TARGET; do kind=${id%%_*}; printf '%s ' "$id"; jq -r --arg kind "$kind" --arg id "$id" '(.aliases[$kind][$id] // "NO_MERGE_ALIAS")' data/identity-overrides/merges.json; done; sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "select kind, alias, target from identity_aliases where (kind='route' and alias in ('route_b6-2015-sbk-corridor','route_m15-local-2010-09-14','route_b45-flatbush-ave-oct2025','route_b69-flatbush-ave-oct2025','route_q35-flatbush-cab1')) or (kind='corridor' and alias in ('corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs','corridor_b82-southern-brooklyn','corridor_bx6-south-bronx'));"
existing_alias_conflicts.target_alias_guard_result: All eight targets returned NO_MERGE_ALIAS from merges.json, and sqlite3 returned no output from identity_aliases.

do_not_merge_conflicts.db_command: sqlite3 -header -column data/canonical.db "with pairs(kind,alias,target) as (values ('route','route_b6-cb18-jun2017','route_b6-2015-sbk-corridor'),('route','route_125th-st-m15','route_m15-local-2010-09-14'),('route','route_b45-flatbush-ave-cb2','route_b45-flatbush-ave-oct2025'),('route','route_b69-flatbush-ave-cb2','route_b69-flatbush-ave-oct2025'),('route','route_q35-flatbush-ave-kickoff','route_q35-flatbush-cab1'),('corridor','corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs-corridor','corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs'),('corridor','corridor_brt-b82-mar2018-southern-brooklyn-b82','corridor_b82-southern-brooklyn'),('corridor','corridor_bx6-south-bronx-sept2016','corridor_bx6-south-bronx')) select d.* from do_not_merge d join pairs p on d.kind=p.kind and ((d.record_id_a=p.alias and d.record_id_b=p.target) or (d.record_id_a=p.target and d.record_id_b=p.alias));"
do_not_merge_conflicts.db_result: no output; no selected pair is present in canonical do_not_merge
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_command: jq -r '.pairs.route[]?, .pairs.corridor[]? | select((.record_ids | index("route_b6-cb18-jun2017") and index("route_b6-2015-sbk-corridor")) or (.record_ids | index("route_125th-st-m15") and index("route_m15-local-2010-09-14")) or (.record_ids | index("route_b45-flatbush-ave-cb2") and index("route_b45-flatbush-ave-oct2025")) or (.record_ids | index("route_b69-flatbush-ave-cb2") and index("route_b69-flatbush-ave-oct2025")) or (.record_ids | index("route_q35-flatbush-ave-kickoff") and index("route_q35-flatbush-cab1")) or (.record_ids | index("corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs-corridor") and index("corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs")) or (.record_ids | index("corridor_brt-b82-mar2018-southern-brooklyn-b82") and index("corridor_b82-southern-brooklyn")) or (.record_ids | index("corridor_bx6-south-bronx-sept2016") and index("corridor_bx6-south-bronx"))) | .record_ids | @tsv' data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json
do_not_merge_conflicts.json_result: no output; no selected pair is present in data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json

prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity111.command: for f in data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch0*-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch10[0-9]-prep.json data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch11[0-1]-prep.json; do jq -r --arg f "$f" '.proposed_aliases[]? | select(.kind=="route" or .kind=="corridor") | select(.alias_id as $a | ["route_b6-cb18-jun2017","route_125th-st-m15","route_b45-flatbush-ave-cb2","route_b69-flatbush-ave-cb2","route_q35-flatbush-ave-kickoff","corridor_woodhaven-cross-bay-sbs-corridor","corridor_brt-b82-mar2018-southern-brooklyn-b82","corridor_bx6-south-bronx-sept2016"] | index($a)) | [$f,.kind,.alias_id,.target_id] | @tsv' "$f" 2>/dev/null; done
prior_prep_conflicts_through_identity111.result: no output; none of the proposed aliases appear in prior codex identity prep artifacts through batch111

source_evidence_spot_check.result_summary: Route spot checks show same route_id and compatible or non-conflicting route service fields. Corridor spot checks show matching corridor names and compatible limits/scope for the selected pairs.

forbidden_command_compliance.result: No external/provider-backed commands or profiles/providers were used. No canonicalize, canonicalize-wave, canonicalize-review, campaign dedup, identity-review-run, write, ask, schema-propose, ontology-normalize-run, materialize, export-jsonl, or validate commands were run. Inspection used local deterministic commands only: pwd, rg, git status, find, sed, head, jq, sqlite3, and date; the only write was this prep artifact.
